testcase.name: test_two_requests_two_increments

failure.message: assert (False or False) + where False = <built-in method endswith of str object at 0x149450bd0>('2.0') + where <built-in method endswith of str object at 0x149450bd0> = 'anomyze_channel_requests_total{channel="kapa"} 5.0'.endswith + and False = <built-in method endswith of str object at 0x149450bd0>(' 2') + where <built-in method endswith of str object at 0x149450bd0> = 'anomyze_channel_requests_total{channel="kapa"} 5.0'.endswith

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.test_api_metrics.TestChannelCounter object at 0x11807f390> client = <starlette.testclient.TestClient object at 0x142f11ae0>
def test_two_requests_two_increments(self, client) -> None: for _ in range(2): client.post( "/api/v1/anonymize", json={"text": "Hallo", "channel": "kapa"}, ) body = client.get("/metrics").text # Two calls on the same label -> value 2.0 for line in body.splitlines(): if line.startswith('anomyze_channel_requests_total{channel="kapa"}'): > assert line.endswith("2.0") or line.endswith(" 2") E assert (False or False) E + where False = <built-in method endswith of str object at 0x149450bd0>('2.0') E + where <built-in method endswith of str object at 0x149450bd0> = 'anomyze_channel_requests_total{channel="kapa"} 5.0'.endswith E + and False = <built-in method endswith of str object at 0x149450bd0>(' 2') E + where <built-in method endswith of str object at 0x149450bd0> = 'anomyze_channel_requests_total{channel="kapa"} 5.0'.endswith
